summary: Comprehensive E2E test of Kronikler: Küllerin Mirası (Turkish RPG). 29/29 backend pytest tests passed covering auth (register/login/me), world generation (3 kingdoms, 3 cities, 10 villages, 5 castles, ~100 NPCs, kings/heirs), state lifecycle, advance time, all 7 chat topics, travel, trade buy/sell + error cases, work, change job (valid/invalid/lord-forbidden), crime, battle, quest accept+complete, marry rejection at low relationship, dialog-topics. Frontend smoke test confirmed register flow → /yeni-oyun → DÜNYAYI YARAT → /oyun world map renders with 3 kingdoms and locations. All 7 nav tabs navigate cleanly. BİR HAFTA GEÇ advances day 0→7. Clicking a location opens City Detail with price table & travel button. NPC list shows 100 NPCs, clicking opens NPC detail with all 7 dialog topic buttons, clicking 'Selam ver' produces a Turkish template response and shows relationship band (nötr · +1).

issues: Mobile bottom nav uses grid-cols-8 but only 8 NAV items — fine on most phones but may feel cramped on small (<360px) viewports. Cosmetic only.

critical_code_review_comments: CORS_ORIGINS in /app/backend/.env is set to '*' while server uses allow_credentials=True — modern browsers reject this combination for cookie-based auth. Since this app uses Bearer tokens (not cookies) it works in practice, but for safety either set explicit origins or disable credentials.
auth.py still accepts cookie 'access_token' but no endpoint sets it — dead code branch.

game_routes.py: advance() default of 7 days is fine, but advance_time(state, days) in simulation.py loops 'days // 7' times for days>=7 yet always adds 7 per loop. If a client passes days=10 they get only one 7-day tick (10//7=1) — minor mismatch with the parameter name.
world_gen.py SURNAMES contains an invisible zero-width char in 'Pa​şa' (line 26) — harmless but cosmetic.
All endpoints return the full state on every action which is heavy (NPCs+locations+history); consider returning diffs for actions that don't touch the world. Acceptable for MVP.
Server uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — FastAPI recommends lifespan handlers. Non-blocking.
DELETE /api/game/state always returns 200 even if no state exists — fine but idempotency could be explicit.

success_rate.frontend: 100% smoke (register, new-game, advance, 7 nav tabs, city detail, NPC chat)

test_credentials: Self-registered test users with random suffix; e.g. ui2_<rand>@k.com / test123
seed_data_creation: Each test run registers a fresh user (uuid-suffixed email) and creates a procedural game world. No persistent seed required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file lives at /app/backend/tests/test_kkm_api.py. Uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. World gen is random — test_world_counts asserts exact counts for kingdoms/cities/villages/castles (deterministic) and a 95–110 range for NPCs (proportional rounding). Marry endpoint test only verifies the 60-relationship rejection path, since gaining +1 per chat to reach 60 is impractical in a single test run. NPC chat 'üzgün' topic on an NPC with 'merhametli' personality gives +2 relationship — covered implicitly. Mobile testid prefix in nav is 'm-nav-*' (e.g. m-nav-world).
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA — backend + frontend both functional. World map data-testid uses 'location-<id>' (not 'loc-<id>' as referenced in initial request) which my first script missed; second script corrected to 'location-' prefix and all checks passed.
